title: RNA-Seq data for mice ovaries
author: Yang, Chan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Ten days old mice were injected with melatonin to 17 days old, and the ovaries were collected for RNA sequencing. The data were analyzed to study the effects of melatonin on early follicular growth.
steps_raw: Ten days old mice were injected with melatonin to 17 days old, and the ovaries were collected for RNA sequencing. The data were analyzed to study the effects of melatonin on early follicular growth.
